82433311.title: Henrike
82433311.extract:
Henrike is a feminine given name of Germanic origin, the female form of the male given name Henrik. Notable women with the name include:

Henrike Brandstötter (born 1975), Austrian politician
Henrike Hahn (born 1970), German politician
Henrike Handrup (born 1983), German former Paralympic cyclist
Henrike Heiland (born 1975; pen name: Zoë Beck), German writer, publisher, and translator
Henrike Kadzidroga (born 1971), German tennis player
Henrike Lähnemann (born 1968), German medievalist and academic
Henrike Naumann (1984–2026), German installation artist
